top_signals.title: LNG Tanker Heads Toward Hormuz as US-Iran Pact Goes Into Effect
top_signals.summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker that loaded in Qatar is nearing the Strait of Hormuz, a hint that traffic may increase after an interim US-Iran peace deal went into effect.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How JobMarineMan Is Building a Direct Crew Recruitment Ecosystem
top_signals.summary: Maritime recruitment has become more digital, but many platforms still replicate familiar agency workflows online. JobMarineMan.com, developed by ship and crew management company Marine MAN, is taking a different approach: a direct recruitment…
